name: 9p12q13_pericentric_inversion_polymorphism
description: inv(9)(p12q13) - the canonical 'normal variant' pericentric inversion encompassing the pericentromeric satellite blocks. Frequency 1-3% in most populations (higher in some African and Asian cohorts). Traditionally considered benign; some studies report subfertility association.

architecture.internal_structure: Pericentric inversion mediated by satellite/SD-rich breakpoints in 9p12 and 9q13; >1% population frequency makes this a polymorphism rather than disease variant.
